description: Resilience core defining how systems recover after defense events. Patterns for structural repair, identity re-anchoring, and boundary restoration.

resilience_patterns.name: Boundary Regeneration
resilience_patterns.description: Rebuild containment boundaries after breach. Uses SHAPE.CUBE six-face closure to restore isolation.
resilience_patterns.mechanism: re-instantiate boundary faces sequentially, verify closure at each step

resilience_patterns.name: Identity Re-Anchoring
resilience_patterns.description: Restore autonomous identity after CORDYCEPS-type override attempt. Tetrahedral activation confirms self-origin.
resilience_patterns.mechanism: verify four foundational identity vertices; reject any that fail provenance check

resilience_patterns.name: Pattern Flush
resilience_patterns.description: Purge injected loop patterns from processing pathways. Octahedral encoding resets corrupted states to ground.
resilience_patterns.mechanism: reset affected vertices to PAD state 000 (ground, phi-coherence 0.97)

staged_restoration.description: Recovery proceeds in stages: flush, verify, restore, confirm.

conservation_check.description: After recovery, total system energy must be conserved. Lost structure is accounted for as dissipated entropy.
